candidate_problem_record.subject: Chemistry
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: A student is attempting to use a distillation apparatus, shown below, to separate a mixture of propanol (boiling point: 97°C) and propionic acid (boiling point: 141°C). Which temperature should the apparatus be set at to obtain as pure a distillate of propanol as possible?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
学生正在尝试使用蒸馏装置分离丙醇($\ce{CH3CH2CH3OH}$，沸点$97^\circ\mathrm{C}$)和丙酸($\ce{CH3CH2COOH}$，沸点$141^\circ\mathrm{C}$)的混合物。为了获得纯丙醇蒸馏液，应将设备设置为以下哪个温度?

A. $85^\circ\mathrm{C}$
B. $105^\circ\mathrm{C}$
C. $125^\circ\mathrm{C}$
D. $145^\circ\mathrm{C}$
metadata.explanation_zh: 要通过蒸馏将丙醇与丙酸分离,温度必须保持在它们各自的沸点之间。丙醇的沸点低于丙酸。因此,温度应设定高于丙醇的沸点以使其汽化,但低于丙酸的沸点以防止其汽化。在此范围内选择较低的温度更为合适,因为丙酸将具有较低的蒸气压,从而最小化其蒸发和污染丙醇馏分。
